catalog.shortDescription: Deliver assets to your members with precision and scale.
catalog.longDescription: Shipment allows you to create recipient lists and distribute tokens efficiently using compression. Ideal for rewards, airdrops, and campaigns.

docs.overview: Shipment is your distribution system. It allows you to send tokens to large groups efficiently.
docs.mechanics:
Uses condition engine or JSON lists

Executes via ship wallet

Uses ZK compression for cost efficiency

Results stored after execution
docs.setup:
Create/import ship wallet

Fund wallet

Build recipient list

Execute shipment
docs.pricing:
Free module
Cost per recipient (network/compression dependent)

activationInstructions.intro: Create shipment lists and ship tokens to your community.
steps: Create a ship wallet (or import) in Plan Shipment
Fund it with SOL and tokens from your main wallet
Build a list (conditions or paste JSON)
Check it and ship it directly to your members
activationInstructions.note: Module is active immediately; pricing is per recipient when enabled.
